name: Gesahni Operator
description: Thin OpenClaw tool bindings for Gesahni Operator bridge routes.

baseUrl.description: Gesahni bridge base URL. Falls back to GESAHNI_BASE_URL.

readBridgeToken.description: Gesahni read bridge token. Falls back to GESAHNI_READ_BRIDGE_TOKEN.

writeBridgeToken.description: Gesahni write bridge token. Falls back to GESAHNI_WRITE_BRIDGE_TOKEN.
